title: Fundamentos da economia, mercado financeiro e intenção de voto: as eleições presidenciais brasileiras de 1994, 1998 e 2002
value: O XML não contém corpo integral, mas o resumo descreve testes de hipóteses com dados agregados sobre intenção de voto e indicadores econômicos. Classifiquei como artigo quantitativo explicativo sobre política brasileira, sem atribuir desenho causal específico porque o resumo não declara identificação.
gold_value: The XML contains only metadata (title, abstracts, references) with no article body text, so classification relies on the English and French abstracts. The paper is an empirical quantitative study of economic voting in Brazilian presidential elections (1994, 1998, 2002), testing hypotheses about the relationship between macroeconomic indicators and aggregate voting intentions using time-series data. The abstract describes testing simultaneity between economic indicators and vote intention, consistent with a VAR or similar time-series approach, and concludes that retrospective voting based on economic fundamentals (not financial markets) predominates in Brazil.

title: O conceito de federalismo e a idéia de interesse no Brasil do século XIX
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo declara uso da História dos Conceitos e análise de jornais e debates parlamentares do século XIX. Classifiquei como estudo qualitativo de pensamento político brasileiro, sem variáveis ou desenho causal quantitativo.
gold_value: This is a conceptual history (Begriffsgeschichte) article using Koselleck's methodology to trace the evolution of the concept of federalism in 19th century Brazil. It analyzes newspapers and parliamentary debates as primary sources but employs no quantitative methods. The work is interpretive and historical-theoretical, focused on political concepts and their semantic transformations rather than empirical hypothesis testing.

title: O contextualismo linguístico na história do pensamento político: Quentin Skinner e o debate metodológico contemporâneo
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo mapeia debate metodológico sobre Quentin Skinner e a Escola de Cambridge. Não há dados próprios ou teste empírico, então mantive como ensaio teórico-metodológico.
gold_value: This is a purely theoretical-normative essay on the methodology of the history of political thought. title: Os alunos do ensino médio e Sciences Po: entre a meritocracia e a percepção das desigualdades
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo sustenta uma análise qualitativa dos programas Sciences Po em quatro escolas da Seine-Saint-Denis. O método não é detalhado além da análise desses programas, então mantive status ensaístico e não inferi variáveis formais.
gold_value: Qualitative sociological study using ethnographic fieldwork in four high schools in Seine-Saint-Denis to analyze how Sciences Po outreach programs affect students' perceptions of meritocracy and inequality. No quantitative analysis, no statistical models, no causal inference design. The article draws on the French sociology of education tradition (Dubet, Van Zanten, Oberti) and employs qualitative methods to examine reception mechanisms of an unprecedented educational offer in stigmatized urban environments.

title: Continuidade, Ruptura ou Reciclagem? Uma Análise do Programa Político do Banco Mundial após o Consenso de Washington
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo informa análise documental do programa político do Banco Mundial entre 1989 e 2014. Classifiquei como estudo qualitativo de economia política internacional, com claim interpretativo, mas sem desenho causal identificado.
gold_value: This is a theoretical-analytical essay that traces the evolution of the World Bank's political program from the Washington Consensus era (1989) through 2014. It relies on documentary analysis of the Bank's own publications and secondary literature, with no quantitative data, statistical analysis, or empirical testing. The article argues the Bank's agenda was 'recycled' rather than fundamentally changed, incorporating neo-institutionalist ideas to expand its liberal reform prescriptions across economy, state, civil society, and individual subjectivity in client countries. There are zero tables, figures, or equations (confirmed by counts in XML metadata). The 86 references are predominantly books and critical political economy journals. The method is interpretive-historical and essayistic throughout.

title: Organizar a Desordem: Raízes do Brasil em 1936
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo reconstrói o dilema político em Raízes do Brasil e seus diálogos intelectuais. Trata-se de análise de pensamento político, sem procedimento empírico ou quantitativo declarado no resumo.
gold_value: This is a work of Brazilian political thought/intellectual history. The author reconstructs the arguments of Sergio Buarque de Holanda's Raízes do Brasil (1936), tracing his intellectual dialogue with Oliveira Vianna and Gilberto Freyre around concepts of cordiality, political doctrines vs. national reality, and the idea of 'organizing disorder.' There is no quantitative data, no empirical hypothesis testing, and no causal research design. The method is interpretive-hermeneutic essay based on close reading of primary texts.

title: O Seguro Social e a Construção da Proteção do Trabalho no Brasil
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo apresenta hipótese histórica sobre elites estatais, seguro social e proteção do trabalho no Brasil. Como o resumo não detalha coleta ou desenho, mantive método ensaístico e evidência qualitativa.
gold_value: Historical-analytical study of social insurance and labor protection in Brazil during the Vargas era (1930s-1940s). Uses archival and documentary sources (legislation, government magazines like Cultura Politica, secondary historiography) to argue that state elites deliberately deployed social insurance benefits to strengthen union organization and expand social legislation. title: Bobbio na história das idéias democráticas
journal_title: Lua Nova: Revista de Cultura e Política
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo situa Norberto Bobbio em tradições de teoria democrática. Classifiquei como ensaio de história das ideias democráticas.
gold_value: This is a political theory article that analyzes Norberto Bobbio's intellectual trajectory through close reading of his texts and secondary literature. It traces his shift from ethical-participatory democracy (1940s actionist period) to procedural democracy (post-1955), situating both within broader traditions of democratic thought. No empirical data, no quantitative methods, and no causal claims are present. The method is interpretive analysis of published works and intellectual history.

title: Memória e historicidade em dois "comandos" prisionais
journal_title: Lua Nova: Revista de Cultura e Política
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo apresenta um embate fictício para mapear historicidades de comandos prisionais em São Paulo. Por ser exercício interpretativo sem coleta empírica declarada, mantive como ensaio teórico.
gold_value: This is a qualitative anthropological study that constructs a fictional dialogue between prisoners affiliated with two São Paulo prison commands (PCC and CRBC) to map different historicities and memories about prison 'wars'. It draws on ethnographic fieldwork and uses no quantitative methods, statistical analysis, or causal inference. The authors employ ethnographic/participant observation methodology grounded in anthropological theory (Lévi-Strauss, Viveiros de Castro, Deleuze & Guattari) to explore competing narratives and viewpoints among prisoners.

title: O local e o global na estrutura da política ambiental internacional: a construção social do acidente químico ampliado de Bhopal e da Convenção 174 da OIT

It is a single-case interpretive study in the IR subfield of International Environmental Politics.

title: Domestic coalitions in the FTAA negotiations: the Brazilian case
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo propõe explicação para coalizões domésticas brasileiras nas negociações da ALCA. O método não é declarado, então classifiquei como qualitativo ensaístico com claim causal explícito.
gold_value: This is a qualitative single-country case study of domestic coalitions in Brazil during FTAA negotiations. It uses historical and process-tracing analysis drawing on political economy theories (Rogowski, Katzenstein, Milner) to explain why industrialists and trade unions failed to align despite convergent trade policy preferences. The paper contains no quantitative data analysis, no tables, no figures, and no equations. It makes an implicit causal argument that trade liberalization altered the priorities of labor and capital, preventing coalition formation, but does so through qualitative narrative rather than statistical methods.

title: Relevant Factors for the Voting Decision in the 2002 Presidential Election: An Analysis of the ESEB (Brazilian Electoral Study) Data
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo declara regressões logísticas com dados do ESEB, survey nacional pós-eleitoral. Classifiquei como quantitativo explicativo de comportamento eleitoral, sem claim causal explícito de identificação.
gold_value: This is a quantitative electoral behavior study of the 2002 Brazilian presidential election using post-electoral survey data (ESEB) and logistic regression models. The paper tests hypotheses about factors driving vote choice (religion, partisanship, ideology, government evaluation, candidate attributes) for four candidates. It uses a kitchen-sink logistic regression approach with multiple blocks of predictors rather than a causal identification strategy. The language uses 'explain' in quotes, suggesting awareness that the associations are not strictly causal, but the framing of 'relevant factors for the voting decision' and 'determinants' implies causal reasoning without formal identification.

gold_value: This is a theoretical paper that proposes a conceptual and methodological framework for analyzing transnational social movements, using the World Social Forum as an illustrative case. It contains no quantitative data, no statistical analysis, no tables or figures, and relies entirely on theoretical argumentation drawing from political theory (Habermas, Rawls, Arendt, Touraine) and social movement literature. The paper discusses globalization as a political and cultural struggle and argues that transnational social movements represent a new form of political subject. It fits International Relations given its focus on transnational politics and world governance beyond nation-states.

title: The United Nations System and the Process of Political Articulation of Local Authorities as a Global Actor
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo descreve e analisa a articulação de autoridades locais como ator global no sistema ONU. Classifiquei como qualitativo/teórico de RI, sem método explícito.
gold_value: This article analyzes the interaction between local authorities (organized as UCLG) and the United Nations system, examining how subnational governments achieved political objectives despite limited power resources. It is a qualitative, descriptive-analytical piece grounded in International Relations theory (transnational actors, paradiplomacy, norm creation literature). There is no quantitative data, no statistical analysis, and no formal research design. The paper uses a theoretical framework of 'mixed actors' (sovereignty-bound and sovereignty-free) to explain the political articulation of local authorities as global actors. It is essayistic in method, relying on documentary analysis and theoretical argumentation rather than systematic empirical methods.

title: Social Scientists and Public Administration in the Lula da Silva Government
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo afirma pesquisa empírica sobre presença de cientistas sociais no governo Lula. Como o método não é detalhado, classifiquei como qualitativo ensaístico de administração pública.
gold_value: This article examines the presence of social scientists in high-level federal government positions during the Lula da Silva administration in Brazil. While the authors mention 'empirical research' in the abstract, the paper is fundamentally a descriptive, qualitative study of elite composition and academic backgrounds in public administration. It does not employ quantitative statistical methods, regression models, or causal inference designs. The hypothesis offered — that social scientists' presence is explained more by links to public service than by disciplinary knowledge — is framed discursively rather than tested with formal quantitative methods. The paper fits Public Policy/Administration given its focus on bureaucratic elites and government staffing.

title: Private Security and the State in Latin America: the Case of Mexico City
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo analisa mercado de segurança privada, regulação e Estado na Cidade do México. O resumo não detalha método empírico, então mantive evidência qualitativa ensaística.
gold_value: This is a qualitative, single-country case study of the private security market in Mexico City. title: When is statistical significance not significant?
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo informa uso de replicação, simulações e dados observacionais para discutir valor-p. Classifiquei como artigo metodológico quantitativo, não como estudo substantivo causal.
gold_value: This is a methodological paper that introduces the p-value statistic and demonstrates, through simulations, replications, and observational data, when statistical significance is not meaningful. It argues that graphical analysis should precede p-value interpretation, p-values are pointless for non-random samples and population data, and are highly sensitive to sample size. It does not test a substantive political science hypothesis and has no causal research design. It references Cohen's power analysis book, hence the power analysis flag. The evidence is quantitative (simulations and data demonstrations) with explicit methodology.

title: Perceptions on justice, the judiciary and democracy
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo baseia-se em survey nas regiões metropolitanas de Belo Horizonte, Goiânia, Porto Alegre e Recife. Classifiquei como quantitativo explicativo sobre percepções de justiça e democracia.
gold_value: This is a descriptive empirical paper that uses original survey data from four Brazilian metropolitan regions to explore citizens' perceptions of justice, trust in the judiciary, and dissatisfaction with democracy. It does not employ a causal research design or make causal claims; rather, it describes and explores attitudinal patterns regarding the judicialization of politics in Brazil. The analysis is based on survey responses but the abstract does not indicate regression modeling, causal inference techniques, or significance testing. The paper's goal is to argue descriptively that discontent with political institutions extends to the judiciary, undermining the normative basis for judicialization.

title: Non-domination and Political Institutions: The Contested Concept of Republican Democracy

title: The Elusive New Middle Class in Brazil
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo usa indicadores da POF/IBGE 2008-2009 para avaliar perfil socioeconômico da chamada nova classe média. Classifiquei como quantitativo descritivo, sem desenho causal.
gold_value: This is a descriptive empirical paper that uses survey microdata (POF 2008-2009) to characterize the socio-economic profile of Brazil's so-called 'new middle class' through consumption and living standard indicators. It does not estimate causal effects or seek determinants; rather, it challenges the classification of a particular income stratum as 'middle class' by showing their consumption patterns resemble vulnerable/poor strata more than traditional middle class. No regression models, causal claims, or identification strategies are employed -- the analysis is purely descriptive and classificatory.

title: Mapping Ideological Preferences in Brazilian Elections, 1994-2018: A Municipal-Level Study
value: O XML não contém corpo integral; o resumo declara análise ecológica municipal entre 1994 e 2018 e teste de quatro explicações. Classifiquei como quantitativo explicativo com modelo observacional.
gold_value: This is an empirical quantitative study that constructs a municipal-level ideology index from proportional representation election results in Brazil (1994-2018) and tests four sets of explanatory factors using regression analysis. The paper uses a model-based approach (kitchen sink linear model) without an explicit identification strategy or stated identification assumptions. It makes implicit causal claims by framing incumbency alignment as having a 'gravitational effect' on local ideology, though it does not use explicit causal language such as 'causes' or 'causal effect.'
